title: Firebird Studio workspace connection configuration
description: Declares Firebird connections for this workspace so opening the folder is enough to connect — no need for each teammate to add a connection manually. Never put a password here: it's entered once via the tree's "Set Connection Password" action and stored in VS Code's secure SecretStorage instead.

name.description: Optional label shown in log messages if this entry is invalid.

database.description: Path to the .fdb file. Relative paths are resolved against this workspace folder.

embedded.description: Connect to a local embedded database file instead of a server — requires firebird.useNativeDriver.

authPlugin.description: Authentication plugin override, e.g. Srp256, Srp, Legacy_Auth.

default.description: Auto-connect to this one when the workspace opens, if nothing else is already active.
